# Katanas
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Katanas&prop=wikitext

'''Katanas''' are used by the [[Ninja]] and possibly upcoming samurai class
==Production {{PAGENAME}}==
'''''For production {{PAGENAME}} please follow this '''''[https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/Katanas link]

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Himura's Katana|u}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Molten Katana|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Acid Katana|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Doom Katana|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Broken Branch|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Windcutter|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Blazetalon|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Stem of the Brain|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Asura|l}}
|}
===Starforce {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Stardust Cutter|g}}
|}
